message:
style(tui): apply styled footers to all view modes and upgrade priority/type rendering

Convert Actionable, Attention, Tree, LabelDashboard, FlowMatrix,
TimeTravelDiff, and Sprint footer strings from plain RichText::raw() to
styled_mode_footer() with dim prefix + box-drawing separated hints
using footer_key/footer_hint/footer_sep tokens.  This gives all 12 view
modes consistent footer styling.

Upgrade priority badge rendering to include background tint (not just
foreground colour), and type badge rendering to use type-specific
colours instead of uniform dim.  Use runtime bg_highlight() for
selected-row backgrounds so light-mode themes apply correctly.

Update all 31 affected snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
